page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.8xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores utilizing the AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps under the KVM hypervisor.

In benchmark evaluations, the processor demonstrates strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU tests placing it in the top 25% of tested hardware. Multi-core performance falls into the average tier, as evidenced by stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU scores. Cryptographic capabilities are a notable strength, with the PassMark CPU encryption test scoring in the top 25%, aided by hardware-accelerated instruction sets such as AES, VAES, and SHA_NI. Memory performance is also strong, with the PassMark memory score ranking in the top 25%.

From a resource density perspective, the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers a balanced configuration for general-purpose workloads. The lack of bundled local storage requires external block storage, which is a key architectural tradeoff to consider for I/O-heavy applications. The dedicated physical core allocation with one thread per core ensures consistent compute performance without hyperthreading interference. This profile is suitable for workloads such as database operations, static web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark data highlights strong single-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth, both ranking in the top 25%, alongside strong cryptographic execution. Conversely, multi-core scaling and database operations align with average tier expectations. The absence of local storage represents a key design tradeoff, requiring network-attached storage. This hardware profile is appropriate for general-purpose enterprise workloads, static web serving, and moderate database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong single-core and cryptographic performance.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors, strong single-core execution, and high-speed cryptographic capabilities.

128.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
